overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with red hair exploring a futuristic neon-lit city. The character walks from an open street corner through a covered arcade with vibrant purple and blue neon lighting, then continues through dense urban canyons with towering skyscrapers and steam-filled plazas.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street corner with crosswalk

events.description: character begins crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk
approaching and entering the covered walkway entrance

agents.ego_description: walking across the crosswalk toward the green neon-lit building entrance

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the street parallel to the crosswalk

entered.detail: tall pole with traffic signals and a '40' speed limit sign
tropical palm tree lining the street corner
multi-story building with green facade and pink neon accents
large illuminated advertisement screen showing colorful graphics
broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing

segments.scene_description: The character stands at a sunlit street corner in a futuristic city, then walks across a broad yellow crosswalk. Palm trees and modern glass skyscrapers line the background while a black sedan drives past. The character approaches a green building with vibrant neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian arcade with vibrant neon ceiling

events.description: entering the covered walkway with intense purple and blue neon lighting
neon ceiling shifts from purple to blue and cyan colors

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered arcade passing by illuminated shop fronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking toward the camera in the covered walkway

entered.detail: overhead concrete structure with illuminated neon panel ceiling
glowing purple and pink neon light panels overhead
circular blue neon sign reading 'Tom's Diner'
thick support columns lining the right side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered pedestrian arcade bathed in vibrant purple and blue neon light. The ceiling glows with shifting colored panels while the character passes concrete pillars and shop fronts including a diner with a circular blue neon sign.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street beneath elevated highway overpass

events.description: exiting the covered arcade back into open air beneath an overpass
waiting for vehicles to pass before continuing across the street

agents.ego_description: navigating the street under the overpass, waiting for traffic to clear

notable_agents.action: dark-colored truck driving under the overpass

entered.detail: elevated highway structure with yellow illuminated trim running overhead
ground floor commercial spaces with neon signage
vehicles parked along the curb under the overpass

segments.scene_description: The character exits the neon arcade into the open air beneath a massive elevated highway overpass with yellow accent lighting. The character waits for a truck to pass before crossing the street, with parked cars lining the left side and shops visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon with towering skyscrapers and vertical neon

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the full height of the surrounding megastructures
steam vents release white vapor into the street atmosphere

agents.ego_description: walking while looking up at the towering architecture and neon-lit skyscrapers

entered.detail: massive futuristic towers rising vertically with countless illuminated windows
tall vertical pink and cyan neon light strips running up building facades
ground-level vents emitting thick white steam into the street
elevated walkway connecting buildings with glowing railings

segments.scene_description: The character walks into a dense urban canyon between massive skyscrapers adorned with vertical neon strips in pink and cyan. The camera tilts upward to emphasize the towering scale of the architecture, then returns to street level where steam vents create atmospheric effects among the pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with steam effects and commercial signage

events.description: passing the building facade with large 'SECTOR' signage

agents.ego_description: continuing through the plaza area past steam vents and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in light-colored jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: dark building wall with large illuminated 'SECTOR' text in white
decorative trees with twisted branches in planters
yellow striped pedestrian crossing with 'WALK' text

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open plaza area with steam effects drifting across the path. Passing a building facade with large 'SECTOR' signage, the character continues along the sidewalk where decorative trees and parked cars line the street, with neon billboards illuminating the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bright, sunlit street corner into the neon-drenched depths of a futuristic urban canyon. It begins with the character crossing a broad yellow crosswalk amidst palm trees and glass skyscrapers before moving toward a green building with vibrant signage. As the character enters a covered pedestrian arcade, the lighting shifts abruptly to glowing purple and blue panels and neon diner signs, which then gives way to the open air beneath a massive elevated highway overpass with yellow accents. The scene expands into a dense urban canyon where the camera tilts upward to reveal towering skyscrapers adorned with pink and cyan neon strips before returning to street level. Finally, the movement flows through an open plaza filled with drifting steam and large sector signage, passing decorative trees and illuminated billboards that line the sidewalk.
